_comment: Tauri commands registered in apps/tauri/src-tauri/src/application.rs's generate_handler![...] with no invoke() caller anywhere in src/ today (architecture-hardening.md F24 / L1-2 / L2-4 gate 1). Checked by scripts/check-command-reachability.mjs. Remove an entry the moment it gets a caller (or gets deleted from Rust) — a lingering entry either way is a stale allowlist and fails the gate.
